image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered why islands are biodiversity hotspots?
Context visual: Island biogeography studies how species thrive or struggle in isolated ecosystems.
Escalation visual: More species? Bigger islands! But, why is that?
Evidence visual: Research shows larger islands support greater diversity due to resources and habitat variety.
Payoff visual: Yet, isolation can lead to unique adaptations—think giant tortoises on the Galapagos!
Cta visual: Curious about more science mysteries? Like and follow for more!
